framework.name: GNAP has first-class sub-grant objects for onward delegation
framework.description: GNAP draft explicitly models 'sub-grant' objects for downstream delegation — the closest thing to a universal constrained envelope primitive. But it's early-stage with no widespread deployment.
framework.raw_quote: GNAP draft proposes fine-grained, dynamically negotiated access rights and first-class 'sub-grant' objects for onward delegation

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
